severity_logic.critical: immediate/no-notice termination plus forfeiture or blacklisting

rules.summary: Termination rights may be unilateral or abrupt.
rules.why_risky: One party may be able to end the relationship with limited notice or process.
rules.suggested_question: Can termination require written notice, a cure period for breach, and payment protection for completed work?
false_positive_checks: check whether both parties have equal rights
check whether completed work is paid
check whether a cure period exists

rules.summary: Termination may put payment for completed work at risk.
rules.why_risky: The document may allow withholding or forfeiture after termination.
rules.suggested_question: Can the contract protect undisputed fees and payment for accepted or completed work?
false_positive_checks: check whether only disputed fees are withheld
